title: 3D Door Items
description: Changes door item models to the actual 3D door model, compatible with Vanilla, Create, Copycats...
body:
This Resource Pack simply changes all door item models to use the block model of the door instead of an item texture.

# Compatibility
- Vanilla Minecraft:
  - Oak, spruce, birch, jungle, acacia, dark oak, mangrove, cherry, pale oak, bamboo, crimson, warped, iron, copper, exposed copper, weathered copper and oxidized copper door items.
  - Also with [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport).
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create):
  - Andesite, brass, copper, train and framed glass door items.
- [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats):
  - Copycat, copycat iron, copycat folding and copycat sliding door items.
